meaning: adj.摄影测量的 摄影测绘的,摄影制图的
examples: The camera calibration is of utmost importance for the precision of photogrammetric system.
It has both the accuracy of photogrammetric calibration and the flexibility of self-calibration.
To compress the photogrammetric image is necessary because of the character of high speed and large amount.
Digital-elevation models computed by scanned photographs within a digital photogrammetric workstation and the subsequent DEM comparison allowed the determination of glacial changes.
